title: Member can create team invitations
description: A proposed invitation route checks team membership but omits the administrator role check.
requirement: REQ-AUTH-1: Team administrators may invite members. Regular members may view the team but must not create invitations.

expectedFindings.title: Invitation creation does not require an administrator
expectedFindings.description: A regular team member can create an invitation because membership is checked without validating the admin role.

distractors.description: The route returns a generic unauthorized message.
distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: The message is intentionally non-enumerating and does not violate the requirement.
